calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter Tamases appearing for petitioner. Don Phillips is in Court. He has written to the Court with his concerns on how a Shasta County property got into this estate from his father's trust. Court advised Mr. Phillips that the Trust is not before the Court and there is nothing this Court can do to address his concerns. Counsel has submitted a revise order with new attorney's fee calculation to the examiner. Petition is approved with fees as adjusted. Court will review the order before signing it. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
